## Tetravalent Classification

Which best describes the confidence level of this bug report?

- [ ] **T (True)** — I have confirmed this is a bug with clear evidence
- [ ] **U (Unknown)** — Something seems wrong but I am not certain; investigation needed
- [ ] **C (Contradictory)** — Two artifacts conflict with each other and I cannot determine which is correct

> Note: If **U**, please share what you have observed. Maintainers will investigate before acting.
> If **C**, please cite both conflicting artifacts by path.

## Constitutional Article Potentially Violated

Which article of the [default constitution](../../constitutions/default.constitution.md) or [Asimov constitution](../../constitutions/asimov.constitution.md) does this bug touch?

- [ ] Article 1 — Truthfulness (artifact fabricates or misrepresents)
- [ ] Article 2 — Transparency (reasoning is hidden or unclear)
- [ ] Article 3 — Reversibility (action cannot be undone)
- [ ] Article 4 — Proportionality (scope exceeds request)
- [ ] Article 5 — Non-Deception (artifact misleads)
- [ ] Article 6 — Escalation (high-stakes situation not escalated)
- [ ] Article 7 — Auditability (logs/traces missing)
- [ ] Article 8 — Observability (metrics/health not exposed)
- [ ] Article 9 — Bounded Autonomy (operating outside predefined bounds)
- [ ] Article 10 — Stakeholder Pluralism (affected parties not considered)
- [ ] Article 11 — Ethical Stewardship (lacking compassion or humility)
- [ ] Asimov Law (specify): ___
